dashboard.label: Data Quality — Log Source Entropy
dashboard.description: Monitor log source health by tracking punct pattern diversity. Low variety = potential stuck or degraded source. No TA dependency — works universally. Excludes sourcetypes in the data_quality_exclusions lookup.

search.query: | datamodel Data_Quality Events search | stats dc(Events.punct) as entropy_proxy by sourcetype | lookup data_quality_exclusions sourcetype OUTPUT reason as excluded | where isnull(excluded) | where entropy_proxy < $entropy_threshold$ | stats count as affected_sources

| datamodel Data_Quality Events search | stats dc(Events.punct) as entropy_proxy count as event_count by sourcetype | lookup data_quality_exclusions sourcetype OUTPUT reason as excluded | where isnull(excluded) | where entropy_proxy < $entropy_threshold$ | stats sum(event_count) as total_events

| datamodel Data_Quality Events search | stats dc(Events.punct) as entropy_proxy count as event_count by sourcetype | lookup data_quality_exclusions sourcetype OUTPUT reason as excluded | where isnull(excluded) | where entropy_proxy < $entropy_threshold$ | sort - event_count | head 1 | fields sourcetype

panel.title: Low-Entropy Sources — Detail (click a row to inspect)

search.query: | datamodel Data_Quality Events search | bin _time span=1h | stats dc(Events.punct) as entropy_proxy count as event_count by sourcetype, _time | stats avg(entropy_proxy) as avg_entropy latest(entropy_proxy) as latest_entropy sum(event_count) as total_events by sourcetype | lookup data_quality_exclusions sourcetype OUTPUT reason as excluded | where isnull(excluded) | where avg_entropy < $entropy_threshold$ | eval avg_entropy=round(avg_entropy,1) | sort - total_events | rename sourcetype as Sourcetype avg_entropy as "Avg Distinct punct/hr" latest_entropy as "Latest Distinct punct" total_events as "Total Events"

sourcetype="$selected_sourcetype$" | stats count by punct | eventstats sum(count) as total | eval pct=round(count/total*100,1) | sort - count | head 15 | fields - total | rename punct as "Punct Pattern" count as Events pct as "% of Total"
sourcetype="$selected_sourcetype$" | table _time host source _raw | sort - _time | head 50

| datamodel Data_Quality Events search | bin _time span=1h | stats dc(Events.punct) as entropy by sourcetype, _time | lookup data_quality_exclusions sourcetype OUTPUT reason as excluded | where isnull(excluded) | timechart span=1h avg(entropy) by sourcetype limit=20 useother=false

panel.title: Entropy Heatmap — Sourcetype by Hour of Day

search.query: | datamodel Data_Quality Events search | bin _time span=1h | stats dc(Events.punct) as entropy by sourcetype, _time | lookup data_quality_exclusions sourcetype OUTPUT reason as excluded | where isnull(excluded) | eval hour=strftime(_time,"%H:00") | chart avg(entropy) by sourcetype, hour
